name: for_rootstrip
description: TinyMCE plugin for_rootstrip: strips the forced_root_block wrapper on get/save content

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_rootstrip/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/for_rootstrip/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/for_rootstrip/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/for_rootstrip/
